message:
feat(builder): Expose public API methods and add callback-style helpers

- Make write(), writeFmt(), writeIndent(), indent(), dedent() public
- Add withContextManager() callback-style helper for future use
- Add Partial() helper in closure_impl.zig to reduce comptime explosion
- Update functools.partial to use runtime Partial helper
- Fix tuple context manager bug: recognize contextlib.* and mock.* as test helpers

This enables builder-based codegen migrations while maintaining
compatibility with existing emit()-based code.
